name: gridgeist
description: Design, redesign, and review distinctive web interfaces with a strong grid, precise typography, and product-specific visual systems.

interface.shortDescription: Structure interfaces with taste and spirit.
interface.longDescription: Gridgeist helps Codex create, redesign, and review responsive web interfaces using rigorous grids, precise typography, product evidence, and accessible interaction patterns.
defaultPrompt: Use $gridgeist to design a distinctive responsive web interface.
Use $gridgeist to redesign this UI without breaking behavior.
Review this interface with $gridgeist before editing it.
